sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92066" key="r(ago/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾱγόλογ-ος</orth> (parox.), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92066.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gathering berries</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grapes</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐχῖνος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.45</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
